title: Package Update and Removal

use_cases.name: Update All Packages
use_cases.description: Updates all dependencies to latest versions per composer.json constraints; rewrites composer.lock

use_cases.name: Update Specific Packages
use_cases.description: Partial update targeting named packages; supports wildcard patterns (vendor/*)

use_cases.name: Update Packages Interactively
use_cases.description: Shows autocomplete list of packages with available upgrades; user selects packages to update

use_cases.name: Update with Temporary Constraints
use_cases.description: Applies one-time version constraint narrowing for the update run without editing composer.json; constraint must be subset of existing root requirement

use_cases.name: Refresh Lock Metadata (Mirrors)
use_cases.description: Overwrites lock file hash and refreshes mirror/URL metadata without changing package versions

use_cases.name: Bump Constraints After Update
use_cases.description: After a successful update, automatically invokes BumpCommand.doBump() for packages that were installed/updated in the transaction

use_cases.name: Remove Package
use_cases.description: Removes package from composer.json (require or require-dev), then runs Installer to update lock and installed packages. Reverts composer.json on failure.

use_cases.name: Remove Unused Packages
use_cases.description: Detects all locked packages not reachable from root requirements (transitive walk) and removes them

use_cases.name: Reinstall Packages
use_cases.description: Uninstalls then reinstalls named packages (or wildcard patterns) without changing composer.json or lock file. Supports --type filter. Re-generates autoloader.

use_cases.name: Bump Version Constraints
use_cases.description: Raises lower bounds of require/require-dev constraints in composer.json to currently installed versions using VersionBumper. Updates lock hash if changed.

include_relationships: UC6 includes UC10 (UpdateCommand invokes BumpCommand.doBump() post-install)
extend_relationships: UC3 extends UC2 (interactive selection is extension of specific-package update)
UC4 extends UC2 (temporary constraints narrow the package update)
UC5 extends UC1 (mirror refresh is a variant of full update)
UC6 extends UC1 (bump-after-update triggers after full/partial update)
UC8 extends UC7 (--unused detection extends remove flow)

key_classes.delegates_to: JsonConfigSource::removeLink() to edit composer.json, then Installer::create() then install->run()
InstallationManager::execute() for uninstall+install ops, then AutoloadGenerator::dump()

key_classes.entry_method: execute() -> doBump(io, devOnly, noDevOnly, dryRun, packagesFilter): int

installation_manager_interactions: UpdateCommand: sets output progress on InstallationManager, delegates resolution to Installer
RemoveCommand: sets output progress on InstallationManager, delegates resolution to Installer
ReinstallCommand: calls InstallationManager.execute(localRepo, uninstallOps) then execute(localRepo, installOps) directly
important_notes: All commands extend BaseCommand in Composer\Command namespace
UpdateCommand can chain into BumpCommand internally via bump-after-update config/option
RemoveCommand modifies composer.json before running installer; reverts on failure
ReinstallCommand does NOT modify composer.json or lock file — only re-executes install operations
BumpCommand requires lock file to be fresh (isFresh check); warns for non-project packages
RemoveCommand supports wildcard glob patterns via BasePackage::packageNameToRegexp
ReinstallCommand orders uninstalls by reverse of dependency install order for safety
